title: senna spinescens
intro: Senna spinescens, also known as the prickly senna, is a plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Australia. The medicinal properties of Senna spinescens are attributed to its anthraquinone glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Senna spinescens include its ability to act as a laxative, relieving constipation and promoting regular bowel movements. Senna spinescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tablet, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
